arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Tamworth – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head to Tamworth in a classic FA Cup third-round tie this weekend. Ange Postecoglou’s side travel to the 4,963-capacity Lamb Ground to take on the non-league side, who are seeking a historic giant-killing in a competition made famous by upsets. The venue is a world away from Spurs’ state-of-the-art Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, with […] The post Tottenham XI vs Tamworth – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tamworth vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Non-league Tamworth take on Tottenham in search of a giant-killing in the FA Cup’s third round draw this weekend. It is the biggest gap between two teams in the third round, with 96 places currently separating the sides in the football pyramid. Tamworth compete in the National League and are the lowest-ranked team left in […] The post Tamworth vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: How fifth-tier Tamworth plan to cause an FA Cup giant-killing against Tottenham - and the surprise that awaits for Son and Co, writes MATT BARLOW
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: The two teams' meeting is in essence what the FA Cup is about, threading English football together from top to bottom from the preliminary qualifiers to the final at Wembley Stadium.

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Tottenham in the race to sign Randal Kolo Muani with striker’s future undecided
arts.sum: According to Fabrice Hawkins, Paris Saint-Germain forward Randal Kolo Muani (26) is attracting the interest of several clubs around the continent ahead of a potential move in the winter transfer window.…

arts.ttl: Tamworth vs Tottenham is a David and Goliath clash that embodies the spirit of the FA Cup, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: We've had the minnows of Morecambe, Accrington and Salford taking on the giants of Chelsea, Liverpool and Manchester City, and today Tottenham travel to Tamworth.
